items.description: Click on a location within 64 studs of your character to create a large wall of ice. The ice is slippery and nigh impossible to climb. Use it to block off corridors and routes of escape!

items.name: Shadow Sword
items.description: Equipping the Shadow Sword shrouds your character in darkness. You immediately transform into a warrior wearing a jet-black suit and begin emitting a cloud of dark fog. While your appearance unnerves and disorients your opponents, each sword strike does 35 points of damage and pressing space twice teleports you forward.

items.name: Spec Gamma Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: In the aftermath of World War VII, isolated pockets of human survivors raided ruined government labs, looking specifically for these weapons. The Spec X program had been accelerated in the late 2120s as the prospect of an all out metahuman vs. machine war became increasingly likely. Prized for their ability to slice through viridian steel exoskeletons, the US was determined to find a substitute for the pure diamond required for the manufacture of the Beta models. Sapphire, while still exorbitantly expensive, allowed the army to produce blades that were 95% as effective as the Betas, at only 20% the cost.
